description.overview: The Wire Fox Terrier is a classic British terrier that has won more Best in Show titles at Westminster than any other breed.
description.temperament: Wire Fox Terriers are confident, fearless, and full of energy. They're friendly but independent.
description.health: Prone to eye problems, hip dysplasia, and skin allergies.
description.exercise: Very high energy. Need extensive daily exercise and mental stimulation.

verdict.summary: Classic show-ring champions with terrier spirit. Wire Fox Terriers are confident and energetic - perfect for active, experienced owners.
